measurement_manifest.nps_minimax: nodes_per_second based on evaluated_nodes/minimax_only_seconds when both are usable
measurement_manifest.elapsed_seconds_minimax: time spent in minimax iterative deepening only
measurement_manifest.elapsed_seconds_tt_init: time spent initializing transposition table structures
measurement_manifest.evaluated_nodes_counter_raw: raw evaluated node counter total before usability filtering
measurement_manifest.leaf_nodes_counter_raw: raw leaf node counter total before usability filtering
measurement_manifest.feature_search_elapsed_seconds: sum of per-search call durations captured inside the feature harness
measurement_manifest.feature_search_nps: nodes_per_second based on evaluated_nodes divided by feature_search_elapsed_seconds when node counters are usable
measurement_manifest.feature_search_iterations: number of search calls executed by the feature harness loop
